name: 1'6" x 2'6" Bright Broken Stripe Rectangular Outdoor Door Mat Multicolor - Threshold™ Latex Backed, Shake Clean
description:
Add visual interest and comfort to your porch or entryway with this Bright Broken Stripe Rectangular Outdoor Door Mat from Threshold™. Made from 100% coir, this rectangular doormat helps clear dirt and debris from shoes, while the latex backing prevents it from sliding. This medium-pile doormat features bright broken stripes pattern that pops against the tan backdrop for a welcoming look, and you can simply shake it to clean.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
